'''yachuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:loadability|loadability]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-ch-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loadability|loadability]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yachuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæchihith|yæchihith]] || [[word:yæchihij|yæchihij]] || [[word:yæchihish|yæchihish]] || [[word:yæchihi|yæchihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yachuchuhuth|yachuchuhuth]] || [[word:yachuchuhuj|yachuchuhuj]] || [[word:yachuchuhush|yachuchuhush]] || [[word:yachuchuhu|yachuchuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yachuhuth|yachuhuth]] || [[word:yachuhuj|yachuhuj]] || [[word:yachuhush|yachuhush]] || [[word:yachuhu|yachuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yachufhuth|yachufhuth]] || [[word:yachufhuj|yachufhuj]] || [[word:yachufhush|yachufhush]] || [[word:yachufhuf|yachufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yachuhuthu|yachuhuthu]] || [[word:yachuhuju|yachuhuju]] || [[word:yachuhushu|yachuhushu]] || [[word:yachuhuku|yachuhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yachuhuth|yachuhuth]] || [[word:yachuhuj|yachuhuj]] || [[word:yachuhush|yachuhush]] || [[word:yachuhu|yachuhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yachuhuthul|yachuhuthul]] || [[word:yachuhujul|yachuhujul]] || [[word:yachuhushul|yachuhushul]] || [[word:yachuhukul|yachuhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yachuhuthuthu|yachuhuthuthu]] || [[word:yachuhujuju|yachuhujuju]] || [[word:yachuhushushu|yachuhushushu]] || [[word:yachuhuku|yachuhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yachuhuthun|yachuhuthun]] || [[word:yachuhujun|yachuhujun]] || [[word:yachuhushun|yachuhushun]] || [[word:yachuhukun|yachuhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yachuhuthuoro|yachuhuthuoro]] || [[word:yachuhujuoro|yachuhujuoro]] || [[word:yachuhushuoro|yachuhushuoro]] || [[word:yachuhukuoro|yachuhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
